title: Behind the Scenes - Introduction to Artificial Intelligence with Brian Yu - Chapter 1 - Playing
summary: CS50 is Harvard University's introduction to computer science and programming, offered through multiple platforms including edX, Harvard Extension School, Harvard Summer School, and OpenCourseWare. The content covers artificial intelligence topics with instruction from educators including David J. Malan and Brian Yu.
writeup: This CS50 video offers a behind-the-scenes look at Chapter 1, "Playing," from Harvard University's Introduction to Artificial Intelligence with Brian Yu. CS50 is Harvard's introduction to computer science and programming, distributed across edX, Harvard Extension School, Harvard Summer School, and OpenCourseWare, with instruction from educators including David J. Malan and Brian Yu. The material situates artificial intelligence topics within an established computer science curriculum available through multiple platforms.
